name: Halloween Vore RPG
description:
CW: Vore, Digestion

Whether it was because of a dare, you didn't think it would work, or you were interested, you performed a ritual to enter The Vore Realm, a realm with monsters who want to swallow you whole. It's said you come back to life in the realm whenever you die, so unless you escape, you'll be stuck there for all eternity. But surely you don't want that... right?

Objective

There are three areas: a forest, a swamp, and a corn field. In each of these areas is a ritual circle. Once you touch all three, you can teleport out of the realm and escape whenever you want

Stats

Stamina - Your main method of doing things. Goes down when performing certain actions or by monsters draining it. Recovers when you use Rest or respawn

Digestion - How digested you are. Goes up when inside a monster. When it reaches 100%, you are fully digested, but respawn with 0% digestion

Abilities

Sprint - Drains 15% Stamina. Allows you to run from monsters. Is more effective the further away you are, as well as the denser the area to allow you to lose line of sight

Dodge - Drains 30% Stamina. Allows you to avoid a monster's attack. Not ideal to use, especially considering some monsters can bypass dodge, making it more of a panic option

Hide - Allows you to hide nearby, making you undetectable to most monsters. If you stay in the same spot for too long, you could be found

Rest - Restores 25% Stamina. Leaves you vulnerable if you're in danger, or if you use it multiple times in a row

Struggles

Mechanics - When grabbed or vored, there's a Struggle Gauge. Once it maxes out, you escape, and the monster is stunned

Struggle - Costs 15% Stamina. Increases the Struggle Gauge by 15-25

Breakout - Costs 50% Stamina. Automatically allows you to escape automatically, and stuns the monster for longer

Rest - Recovers 15% Stamina

Surrender - If you're grabbed, you're automatically vored. If you're vored, you're immediately digested

Monster List

Ghost

Vampire

Werewolf

Witch

Demon

Mummy

Scarecrow

Crow Harpy

Mothman

Wendigo

Dev Notes

After way too much teasing, Halloween Vore RPG is finally here. I hope it will be worth the wait, since this is my first bot to surpass 4000 tokens. I tried something different with this one, so please give me feedback on if you like this style, as well as if you have any suggestions for additions to this bot. I hope you enjoy
creator: HistoricalHello12
